title: Creative+
description:
A Create modpack that has great world generation throughout the overworld nether and end whilst offering great create addons.
Also has shader support.
body:
![Creative+](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7019c3ef582e92cd0fc00f783d00e5259deceace.png)

# This pack is made to give the user with the greatest Create experence with friends or by yourself!




### Small list of features.
- Create (with its addons)
- Alexs Mobs
- Biomes O'Plenty
- Ars Nouveau + Ars Creo
- Better End and Nether
- Serene Seasons
- Farmers Delight (with its addons)
- Better Villages
- Oculus (Shaders)
- Quark
- Macaw's Addons
- Plenty of quality of life mods
- Valkyrien Skies
- (plus plenty of optimization)
- AND MUCH MORE TO COME!


### Multiplayer Features
- Easy Voice Chat
- WalkiTalkie's
- ESSENITALS
